meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Solve No-Code Barriers
content.seo_description: Overcome coding barriers with the Antigravity project template. A high-impact guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template bridges the gap between no-code limitations and professional software engineering. By leveraging Claude Code for iterative development, you can scaffold full-stack applications instantly. This workflow transforms abstract ideas into functional, production-ready code, allowing students to focus on logic and architecture rather than syntax errors.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking in a rhythm that feels like a countdown to failure. The gap between your vision and the syntax required to build it feels like a chasm that no amount of basic tutorials can bridge. You aren't just missing code; you are missing the blueprint for modern, AI-augmented development.

But the era of manual boilerplate is dead. By utilizing the Antigravity project template, you are adopting a high-velocity architecture designed for rapid iteration. We are replacing the struggle of 'learning to code' with the art of 'orchestrating code.' Prepare to dismantle the barrier of entry and ship your first production-grade application.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational directory structure using the Antigravity CLI to ensure type safety and modularity from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity base template with integrated TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase auth.

steps.title: Define the Domain Schema
steps.description: Map your application's data requirements to ensure the backend can handle the complexity of your specific project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a student portfolio tracker including users, projects, and tech-stack relations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on project requirements'

steps.title: Inject Business Logic via Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the core functional modules based on your Antigravity boilerplate, ensuring clean separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for the project that handles API data fetching and state management for the dashboard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement service layer with unit tests'

steps.title: Component-Driven UI Assembly
steps.description: Construct the frontend using pre-built Antigravity components, ensuring a responsive and professional aesthetic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard sidebar and main feed component using the existing Antigravity UI theme.

steps.title: Automated Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your repository to an automated CI/CD pipeline to ensure your app is live and accessible to users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment workflow for Vercel with automated environment variable injection.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'prompt-log' file to track the commands that successfully generated complex features.
Use Claude Code's 'review' flag on every PR to catch architectural flaws before they become technical debt.
Leverage Antigravity's 'ghost-mode' to test edge cases in your auth flow without needing to manually sign up repeatedly.
Refactor generated code every 3 modules to keep the bundle size optimized for production performance.
Prioritize standardizing your API response structures early to prevent breaking changes when scaling the project.
content.next_steps: After deployment, focus on user testing and gathering feedback. Implement a feedback loop by using Claude to analyze user session data and suggest feature improvements.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer a student struggling with syntax; you are a builder with a scalable infrastructure. The only thing standing between you and a portfolio that gets you hired is the first commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
